attributes.db.name: taskflow
attributes.db.statement:
SELECT users.id, users.email, users.hashed_password, users.display_name, users.created_at, users.is_active 
FROM users 
WHERE users.id = $1::UUID /*db_driver='asyncpg',db_framework='sqlalchemy%%3A2.0.51',traceparent='00-78259b00645f34786ea66091386944fa-bcd17732937691e6-03'*/

attributes.db.name: taskflow
attributes.db.statement: INSERT INTO comments (id, task_id, author_id, content) VALUES ($1::UUID, $2::UUID, $3::UUID, $4::VARCHAR) RETURNING comments.created_at /*db_driver='asyncpg',db_framework='sqlalchemy%%3A2.0.51',traceparent='00-78259b00645f34786ea66091386944fa-e715e9f92f41fc1f-03'*/
